chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3846 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.16811/2024. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.06, 20 & 21. 3. For orders on Misc. No.16812/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 19.08.2024. Mr. Muhammad Saleh Kolachi, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- 1. Urgency granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. The Petitioner was apparently serving with Provincial Police Force and was proceeded against departmentally, with those proceedings culminating in his compulsory retirement from service vide Order dated 19.01.2024. It is said that a Departmental Appeal has also been filed, which remains pending. Upon presentation of the matter, the Office had raised an objection as to its maintainability in view of the bar set out under Article 212 of the Constitution. On query posed in that regard, learned counsel for the Petitioner was unable to advance any satisfactory response. On the contrary, he conceded that a final remedy lay before the concerned Service Tribunal. Under such circumstances, while sustaining the Office Objection, the Petition accordingly stands dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
